data.strength: Since the pot increased 2.2x, I found being socially good and maxing out the contribution was the best strategy for me. Additionally showing that I contributed 20 induced other players to contribute likewise, increasing the total pot contribution and therefore my gains. I additionally acted like a "hype man" in chat and tried to get everyone to contribute all they could.
data.feedback: Not really an issue but I wanted to comment that knowing that there's a set amount of rounds allows participants to decide to be selfish on the last round without repercussion. Disappointing to see so many of my group members turn on the last round in the game. Human nature is so disappointing :(
